'''pasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jumpingly|jumpingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jumpingly|jumpingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pasate|pasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pasatesher|pasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasatesherĂ«m|pasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pasatero|pasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pasateshĂ«|pasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasateshĂ«m|pasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipasatero|gokipasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipasateshĂ«|gokipasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasateshĂ«m|gokipasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopasankerom|gopasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopasankeshĂ«|gopasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasankeshĂ«m|gopasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopasankeya|gopasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pasaterom|pasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasatemu|pasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pasateya|pasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipasaterom|gokipasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasatemu|gokipasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipasateya|gokipasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pasasate|pasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pasasatesher|pasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasasatesherĂ«m|pasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pasasatero|pasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pasasateshĂ«|pasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasasateshĂ«m|pasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipasasatero|gokipasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipasasateshĂ«|gokipasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasasateshĂ«m|gokipasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopasasankerom|gopasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopasasankeshĂ«|gopasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasasankeshĂ«m|gopasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopasasankeya|gopasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pasasaterom|pasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pasasatemu|pasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pasasateya|pasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipasasaterom|gokipasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipasasatemu|gokipasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipasasateya|gokipasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠte|pĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠtesher|pĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠtero|pĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠtero|gokipĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠterom|pĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠtemu|pĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠsĂŠteya|pĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠterom|gokipĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠsĂŠteya|gokipĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafsafte|pafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafsaftesher|pafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafsaftesherĂ«m|pafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafsaftero|pafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafsafteshĂ«|pafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafsafteshĂ«m|pafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafsaftero|gokipafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafsafteshĂ«|gokipafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafsafteshĂ«m|gokipafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafsafnkerom|gopafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafsafnkeshĂ«|gopafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafsafnkeshĂ«m|gopafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafsafnkeya|gopafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafsafterom|pafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafsaftemu|pafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafsafteya|pafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafsafterom|gokipafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafsaftemu|gokipafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafsafteya|gokipafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
